summary: Phase12 is closed as a completion-judgment phase, not a further repair phase. The phase established end-to-end reachability, clarified that transient APIConnectionError was low reproducibility, and identified the final canary-01 failure as a duplicate definition of orchestrator_version() in orchestration/run_session.py rather than an infrastructure issue. The next phase should start from the current main state as the baseline.

base_reference.note: Use the current verified main state as the baseline for the next phase.

phase_outcome.reason: Current work is better treated as completion judgment and evidence fixation than as continued repair inside canary-01.

confirmed_facts.fact: Phase12 reached an end-to-end execution stage sufficient to evaluate completion status.
Transient APIConnectionError was observed but had low reproducibility.
The final canary-01 failure reason was a duplicate definition of orchestrator_version() in orchestration/run_session.py.
The duplicate definition issue is treated as a code-state problem, not an infrastructure problem.
The next phase should proceed from the current main state as the project baseline.

interpretations.interpretation: The observed APIConnectionError should not be treated as the governing blocker for Phase12 closure.
canary-01 should be closed as a diagnostic branch/output, not continued as the active repair track.
Phase12 completion is primarily evidence-based closure with explicit review notes, rather than a claim that every exploratory branch succeeded.

uncertainties_or_preconditions.item: The repository worktree must be clean at closure time.
If artifacts or commit hashes are to be referenced, they must be filled with the actual local values before final commit.

e2e_reachability.stage: Phase12 reached end-to-end execution sufficient for completion judgment.
e2e_reachability.note: This report records the reached stage as evidence of progress, even though canary-01 ended in a code-level failure.

canary_01_final_state.final_failure_reason: Duplicate definition of orchestrator_version() in orchestration/run_session.py.
canary_01_final_state.action: Do not continue canary-01. Treat it as a closed diagnostic endpoint.

api_connection_error_assessment.assessment: The temporary APIConnectionError did not establish a stable or governing failure pattern for Phase12.

acceptance_results.title: E2E到達ステージが記録されている
APIConnectionError の再現性評価が記録されている
canary-01 の最終失敗理由が明記されている
infrastructure 問題ではないことが明記されている
次フェーズが main 基準で進むことが明記されている

risks: If duplicate-definition cleanup is performed later without a separate scoped session, traceability may be weakened.
If the temporary APIConnectionError is overinterpreted as infrastructure failure, future prioritization may be distorted.
open_issues: sandbox/session-canary-01 branch remains as a closed diagnostic reference. Delete when no longer needed.
Any further fix for orchestrator_version duplicate definition is handled in a new scoped session if needed.
next_phase_entry_conditions: Current main (08e5b77) is verified as the baseline branch/state.
Worktree is clean before starting the next scoped session.
canary-01 is not resumed as an active repair line.
Any further fix for orchestrator_version duplicate definition is handled in a new scoped session.

recommended_next_action.description: Freeze Phase12 with this report, keep canary-01 closed, and begin the next phase from the current main baseline.
